name: Sujita Basnet
profileSummary: Sujita Basnet is an American-Nepalese beauty pageant titleholder and a management consultant who participated in many beauty pageants from 2011 to 2021. She was crowned as Miss Universe Nepal 2021. She represented Nepal at Miss Universe 2021. She was also the first runner up to Miss Universe Nepal 2020. She works as a management consultant for Fortune 500 firms and hold a bachelor’s in biomedical engineering.
